generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving identifier references or invalid expressions reported by the validator.
Move guarantees referencing implementation details to the implementation annex.
Remove clauses involving unsupported data type comparisons (e.g., Boolean ranges) unless a numeric scalar representation is available.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure all referenced AADL features are visible in the current scope.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing unqualified identifiers or dependencies not present in the AADL model.
Do not attempt to repair by adding new AADL architecture; focus on fixing existing contract expressions.
